title: Salty Light Comforting Moroccan Purple Sprouting Broccoli Stir-fry
description: A light and comforting dish featuring salty flavors with a twist of Morocco in a low-fat-friendly preparation.

ingredients.name: 1 cup, rinsed purple sprouting broccoli florets
2 tbsp olive oil
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with any neutral-flavored oil for a low-fat option.

ingredients.name: 1/4 tsp red pepper flakes (optional)
ingredients.notes: For added heat, use 1/8 tsp if desired.

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper to taste
Fresh cilantro leaves for garnish
ingredients.notes: Approximately 3-4 leaves per serving, roughly chopped.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add cumin and red pepper flakes (if using), stir well to combine, and cook for about 15 seconds until fragrant.
Toss in rinsed purple sprouting broccoli florets, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 2-3 minutes until slightly softened but still bright green.
Remove from heat and serve garnished with fresh cilantro leaves.
Optional: Add a splash of lemon juice or tahini for extra flavor.
